text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you haven't found it yet, keep looking. Don't settle.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Remembering that you are going to die is the best way to avoid the trap of thinking you have something to lose.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Details matter, it’s worth waiting to get it right.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Simple can be harder than complex: You have to work hard to get your thinking clean to make it simple.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Things don't have to change the world to be important.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I want to put a ding in the universe.
author: Steve Jobs

text: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.
author: Elon Musk

text: If you get up in the morning and think the future is going to be better, it is a bright day.
author: Elon Musk

text: Persistence is very important. You should not give up unless you are forced to give up.
author: Elon Musk

text: It's OK to have your eggs in one basket as long as you control what happens to that basket.
author: Elon Musk

text: Failure is an option here. If things are not failing, you are not innovating enough.
author: Elon Musk

text: Work like hell. I mean you just have to put in 80 to 100 hour weeks every week. This improves the odds of success.
author: Elon Musk

text: You want to have a future where you're expecting things to be better, not one where you're expecting things to be worse.
author: Elon Musk

text: Constantly think about how you could be doing things better and questioning yourself.
author: Elon Musk

text: Patience is a key element of success.
author: Bill Gates

text: If you show people the problems and you show people the solutions, they will be moved to act.
author: Bill Gates

text: It's fine to celebrate success but it is more important to heed the lessons of failure.
author: Bill Gates

text: We all need people who will give us feedback. That’s how we improve.
author: Bill Gates

text: Don’t compare yourself with anyone in this world… if you do so, you are insulting yourself.
author: Bill Gates

text: To win big, you sometimes have to take big risks.
author: Bill Gates

text: Most people overestimate what they can do in one year and underestimate what they can do in ten years.
author: Bill Gates

text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk. In a world that's changing really quickly, the only strategy that is guaranteed to fail is not taking risks.
author: Mark Zuckerberg

text: Move fast and break things. Unless you are breaking stuff, you are not moving fast enough.
author: Mark Zuckerberg

text: If you double the number of experiments you do per year you’re going to double your inventiveness.
author: Jeff Bezos

text: I knew that if I failed I wouldn't regret that, but I knew the one thing I might regret is not trying.
author: Jeff Bezos

text: One of the only ways to get out of a tight box is to invent your way out.
author: Jeff Bezos

text: Always deliver more than expected.
author: Larry Page

text: If you're changing the world, you're working on important things. You're excited to get up in the morning.
author: Larry Page

text: You don't need to have a 100-person company to develop that idea.
author: Larry Page

text: Optimism, passion, growth mindset, raw intelligence, and a track record of getting things done.
author: Sam Altman

text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
author: Alan Kay

text: The most damaging phrase in the language is: 'It’s always been done this way.'
author: Grace Hopper

text: If you don't risk anything, you risk even more.
author: Erica Jong

text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: John Johnson

text: The beautiful thing about learning is nobody can take it away from you.
author: B.B. King

text: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
author: Austin Freeman

text: You might not think that programmers are artists, but programming is an extremely creative profession.
author: John Romero

text: If you can't decide, the answer is no.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: A fit body, a calm mind, a house full of love. These things cannot be bought—they must be earned.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: Impatience with actions, patience with results.
author: Naval Ravikant

text: It’s better to make a few people really happy than a lot of people semi-happy.
author: Paul Graham

text: The way to get big ideas is to notice anomalies: things that are counterintuitive or unexpected.
author: Paul Graham

text: Strive for perfection in everything you do. Take the best that exists and make it better.
author: Sir Henry Royce

text: Your reputation is more important than your paycheck, and your integrity is worth more than your career.
author: Ryan Freitas

text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Make it happen now, because tomorrow becomes never.
author: Tech Proverb
